# Plain Memory

Gridlock guidance carrying no `quality`, `beliefState`, or `scope_*`
frontmatter at all — the neutral baseline every filter combination should
include unconditionally (unfiltered scope, `current` belief by the
unset-passes-current rule, default quality).
